filterDesc.sinceLastVisit: Topics that changed since you last opened AppleVis.
filterDesc.unread: Topics you have not opened yet on this device.
filterDesc.following: Topics you are following. Saved locally and synced via iCloud.
filterDesc.saved: Topics you saved for later. Synced via iCloud.

noTopicsEmpty.following: You are not following any topics yet.
noTopicsEmpty.saved: You have not saved any topics yet.
noTopicsEmpty.sinceLastVisit: No new activity since your last visit.

search.accessibilityHint: Type to search forum topics, app listings, and resources.
search.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or check your spelling.
search.intro: Search across forum topics, app directory listings, and resources. Results appear as you type.

settings.credentialsHint: Use your AppleVis website email and password.
settings.groupedNote: Settings are grouped so VoiceOver users do not have to swipe through one long list of switches.
settings.storageCacheDesc: Manage downloads, cached content, and retention policy.
settings.a11ySignOutHint: Removes your account from this device.

storage.cacheRetentionDesc: How long to keep cached content before automatically removing it.
storage.clearStorageDesc: Downloads stay until deleted here. Cached content re-downloads automatically when you open each section.
storage.confirmClearDownloads: This will remove {{size}} of downloaded podcast episodes from this device.
storage.confirmClearCache: This will remove {{size}} of cached content. It will be re-downloaded next time you open each section.
storage.confirmClearAll: This will remove {{size}} including all downloads and cached content.

offline.withAge: Showing saved content from {{age}}. Pull down to refresh when online.
offline.noAge: Showing saved content. Pull down to refresh when online.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

toast.signInRequired: Sign in required. Visit Settings to sign in.
toast.summariseComing: Summarisation will be available when Apple Intelligence Foundation Models support is added.
toast.simplifyComing: Plain-language simplification coming when Apple Intelligence Foundation Models support is added.
toast.consensusComing: Accessibility consensus coming when Apple Intelligence Foundation Models support is added.

writingTools.tip: Apple Intelligence: select text you type to proofread, rewrite, shorten, or translate using Writing Tools.
writingTools.a11yLabel: Apple Intelligence tip: select any text you type to proofread, rewrite, shorten, or translate it using Writing Tools.

translationBanner.message: Your message appears to be in another language. AppleVis is an English community — would you like to translate it before posting?

screen.a11ySearchHint: Opens search to find forum topics, apps, and resources.
screen.a11ySettingsHint: Opens AppleVis settings, profile, help, and support.
